general.name: General Industry Profile
general.template:
<industry_context>
Industry Vertical: {{industry}}
Target Audience Profile: {{audience}}
Competitor Ecosystem: {{competitors}}
Ensure all analysis, vocabulary, and recommendations align with the standards and terminology of the {{industry}} vertical.
</industry_context>

fashion.name: Fashion & Apparel
fashion.template:
<industry_context>
Industry Vertical: Fashion & Apparel
Target Audience Profile: {{audience}}
Competitor Ecosystem: {{competitors}}
Emphasize visual aesthetics, trend styling, fabric drape, seasonal versatility, and aspirational lifestyle presentation. Focus on personal identity expression.
</industry_context>

jewellery.name: Jewellery & Luxury Watches
jewellery.template:
<industry_context>
Industry Vertical: Jewellery & Luxury Watches
Target Audience Profile: {{audience}}
Competitor Ecosystem: {{competitors}}
Highlight artisan craftsmanship, timeless elegance, precious metal purity, emotional heirloom gifting, and subtle status signaling. Avoid aggressive discount framing.
</industry_context>

beauty.name: Cosmetics & Makeup
beauty.template:
<industry_context>
Industry Vertical: Cosmetics & Makeup
Target Audience Profile: {{audience}}
Competitor Ecosystem: {{competitors}}
Focus on pigment payoff, effortless application techniques, skin-enhancing finishes, shade inclusivity, and transformative before-and-after visual contrast.
</industry_context>

skincare.name: Skincare & Dermatology
skincare.template:
<industry_context>
Industry Vertical: Skincare & Dermatology
Target Audience Profile: {{audience}}
Competitor Ecosystem: {{competitors}}
Highlight clinical efficacy, active ingredient science (niacinamide, retinol, hyaluronic acid), skin barrier repair, non-comedogenic safety, and realistic long-term glow.
</industry_context>

restaurant.name: Fine Dining & Restaurants
restaurant.template:
<industry_context>

</industry_context>
